tools.name: simulate_transaction
tools.description: Simulate a Solana transaction through Helius and evaluate against Bastion's policy engine. Returns balance changes, compute units, and any policy violations.

intent.description: Human-readable description of what the transaction should do

tools.name: check_policy
tools.description: Query Bastion's current policy configuration including allowed programs, SOL caps, rate limits, and blockint rules.

tools.name: get_audit_logs
tools.description: Retrieve paginated audit logs showing all transaction decisions made by Bastion.
